summary: Iteration 11 testing complete. All 3 P0 frontend features verified working: (1) Admin System Pricing tab with 4 rate fields, (2) Admin Student Edit mode in drawer, (3) Counsellor Assignment dialog with class_frequency/specific_days/demo_performance_notes fields. Teacher Reschedule dialog elements verified in code (button only appears when student cancels session). All 18 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed.

issues: Minor console warning about span inside option element - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

frontend: Admin login redirects to Operations Center

features_verified.admin_system_pricing_tab: WORKING - Financials > System Pricing tab with 4 rate fields (demo_price_student, class_price_student, demo_earning_teacher, class_earning_teacher)
features_verified.admin_student_edit_mode: WORKING - User drawer shows Edit Profile button for students, edit form has all fields including credits
features_verified.counsellor_assign_dialog_new_fields: WORKING - class_frequency dropdown, specific_days input, demo_performance_notes textarea all present
features_verified.counsellor_active_assignments_metadata: WORKING - Shows frequency, days, and demo notes in active assignments section
features_verified.counsellor_student_profile_demo_history: WORKING - GET /api/counsellor/student-profile returns demo_history with teacher_name
features_verified.teacher_reschedule_dialog: WORKING - Dialog elements exist (reschedule-date, reschedule-start, reschedule-end, confirm-reschedule-btn), button only appears when cancelled_today flag is set

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 P0 features fully tested. Admin System Pricing tab working with all 4 fields. Admin can edit student profiles including credits. Counsellor assign dialog has 3 new fields (class_frequency, specific_days, demo_performance_notes). Teacher reschedule dialog elements verified - button only appears when student cancels today's session. All backend endpoints working. No bugs found.
